# ESP32-2432S028R (CYD) Flow B host: the AOT-compiled app + CYD board bring-up + the lean SPI backend.
# No QuickJS — the app is compiled C (app.gen.c), linked straight into the firmware.
#
# app.gen.c is generated by the Flow B AOT compiler (NOT committed). Generate it first, sized for this
# board's tight RAM (a small list-pool cap keeps the engine node count down):
#   (in bridges/quickjs/js)  ER_AOT_LIST_CAP=8 npm run aot -- music-player    # → dist/app.gen.{c,h}
set(APP_GEN "${EMBEDDED_REACT_SRC_DIR}/bridges/quickjs/js/dist/app.gen.c")
set(APP_GEN_DIR "${EMBEDDED_REACT_SRC_DIR}/bridges/quickjs/js/dist")

# Only check during the real configure pass (EMBEDDED_REACT_SRC_DIR is empty during IDF's early
# requirements-expansion pass, which would make this fire spuriously).
if(EMBEDDED_REACT_SRC_DIR AND NOT EXISTS "${APP_GEN}")
    message(FATAL_ERROR
        "No AOT app at ${APP_GEN} — generate it first (sized for this board):\n"
        "    cd bridges/quickjs/js && ER_AOT_LIST_CAP=8 npm run aot -- music-player")
endif()

idf_component_register(
    SRCS "main.c" "board.c" "${APP_GEN}"
    INCLUDE_DIRS "." "${APP_GEN_DIR}"
    REQUIRES engine esp32-spi-lcd-backend esp_lcd driver esp_timer
)
